dataset_name: HIV+ Tumor Molecular Characterization Project DLBCL
wgs_scale_evidence: GDC API shows WGS files including 116 BAM aligned-read files >=40 GB
file_size_or_depth_evidence: GDC API local manifest: 766 WGS files; 116 BAMs >=40 GB; total WGS-related file volume 38.7 TB
relevance_notes: Best NIH/GDC lead for this project because it is HIV-associated DLBCL and has true WGS-scale BAMs.

dataset_name: HIV+ Tumor Molecular Characterization Project DLBCL dbGaP substudy
wgs_scale_evidence: dbGaP description says WGS of paired tumor and germline DNA planned/performed for HIV-associated tumors; GDC has WGS files
approx_samples_or_cases: 23 consented subjects on older dbGaP page; GDC currently shows 66 WGS cases
file_size_or_depth_evidence: dbGaP source states whole genome sequencing of paired tumor and germline DNA; GDC file API confirms WGS-scale BAMs
relevance_notes: Use dbGaP/GDC access request as formal route for controlled raw data.

wgs_scale_evidence: GDC API shows WGS files including 98 BAM aligned-read files >=40 GB
file_size_or_depth_evidence: GDC API local manifest: 711 WGS files; 98 BAMs >=40 GB; total WGS-related file volume 26.7 TB
relevance_notes: Good NIH/GDC DLBCL WGS comparator; smaller than HTMCP-DLBCL but true WGS-scale.

wgs_scale_evidence: GDC API shows WGS files including 463 BAM aligned-read files >=40 GB
file_size_or_depth_evidence: GDC API local manifest: 3232 WGS files; 463 BAMs >=40 GB; total WGS-related file volume 154.4 TB
relevance_notes: Not HL/DLBCL/PTLD, but EBV-related lymphoma and useful for viral-subtype expansion if paper scope allows Burkitt lymphoma.

dataset_name: Molecular evolution of classic Hodgkin lymphoma WGS
wgs_scale_evidence: EGA reports BAM WGS dataset and 9.1 TB size
relevance_notes: Best true HL WGS dataset found; controlled access.

dataset_name: EBV-positive DLBCL WGS and targeted sequencing
wgs_scale_evidence: EGA reports WGS of EBV-associated DLBCL matched tumor-normal patients
approx_samples_or_cases: 63 samples; 8 matched tumor-normal WGS patients plus 47 targeted cases
file_size_or_depth_evidence: True WGS but small WGS subset; likely >=40 GB/sample for BAMs but dataset size not captured locally
relevance_notes: Most disease-specific EBV-positive DLBCL WGS candidate.

dataset_name: ICGC MMML-Seq mature B-cell lymphoma WGS
wgs_scale_evidence: EGA/ICGC MMML-Seq WGS resource; publications describe 186 GC-derived B-cell lymphomas and EGA page reports 315 WGS samples
approx_samples_or_cases: 315 WGS samples on EGA study page
file_size_or_depth_evidence: Expected true WGS scale; exact BAM sizes not downloaded in this pass
relevance_notes: Large DLBCL/FL WGS resource for viral subtype expansion after controlled access.

dataset_name: Primary central nervous system lymphoma WGS and RNA-seq
wgs_scale_evidence: Nature Communications data availability reports WGS and RNA-seq of 51 CNSL samples
file_size_or_depth_evidence: Expected true WGS scale; exact BAM sizes not downloaded in this pass
relevance_notes: DLBCL-spectrum CNS lymphoma; useful if EBV/anellovirus in lymphoma WGS is broader than systemic DLBCL.

wgs_scale_evidence: EGA study contains whole genome and targeted capture sequencing of mature B-cell lymphomas
approx_samples_or_cases: multiple DLBCL/FL/BL/HGBCL samples; exact count by dataset
file_size_or_depth_evidence: Expected true WGS scale for WGS subset; exact BAM sizes not downloaded in this pass
relevance_notes: Supplementary B-cell lymphoma WGS source; useful if access is easier than ICGC/MMML.

wgs_scale_evidence: PCAWG performed WGS on >2600 cancers; external inventory reports 105 mature B-cell lymphoma samples
approx_samples_or_cases: 105 mature B-cell lymphoma samples in available summaries
file_size_or_depth_evidence: True WGS pan-cancer resource; raw identifiable data require controlled access
relevance_notes: Useful for processed WGS-derived comparison or raw-data viral screen if access is approved.

dataset_name: The DNA virome varies with human genes and environments
accession_or_project: UK Biobank / All of Us / SPARK
wgs_scale_evidence: Nature 2026 reports high-coverage WGS mean 32.5x to 42x
approx_samples_or_cases: 490401 UKB blood; 365918 AoU blood; 48899 AoU saliva; 12519 SPARK saliva
file_size_or_depth_evidence: Population-scale high-coverage WGS; far above 40 GB/sample in typical raw/CRAM scale
relevance_notes: Directly relevant method benchmark for EBV, HHV-7, HHV-6B and anelloviruses, but not lymphoma-specific.

dataset_name: Population-scale sequencing resolves determinants of persistent EBV DNA
wgs_scale_evidence: Nature 2026 analyzes EBV reads from population-scale blood WGS
approx_samples_or_cases: 490560 UKB WGS; 131938 AoU EUR replication for GWAS
file_size_or_depth_evidence: High-coverage population WGS; GWAS summary stats available via GWAS Catalog/LocusZoom
relevance_notes: Best recent Nature dataset/method for EBV DNAemia GWAS and disease association framing.

dataset_name: Host control of persistent Epstein-Barr virus infection
wgs_scale_evidence: Nature 2026 uses blood-based genome sequence data from UKB and AoU
file_size_or_depth_evidence: Large blood GS/WGS cohorts; GWAS Catalog IDs include GCST90809298-GCST90809306
relevance_notes: Recent Nature EBV persistence dataset; useful for P3 instruments, thresholds, and GWAS/MR comparison.

dataset_name: Blood DNA virome associates with autoimmune diseases and COVID-19
wgs_scale_evidence: Nature Genetics 2025 analyzed 6321 Japanese WGS datasets; anellovirus analyzed in 5597 non-cell-line WGS samples
file_size_or_depth_evidence: WGS on HiSeq X/NovaSeq 2x150; exact raw size not downloaded
relevance_notes: Excellent anellovirus and HHV-6 detection method/control dataset, not lymphoma-specific.

dataset_name: Genomic characterization of lymphomas in patients with inborn errors of immunity
wgs_scale_evidence: NCBI RunInfo downloaded locally: mixed WGS/WXS/targeted; 9 WGS runs
file_size_or_depth_evidence: NCBI RunInfo: 415.5 GB total across all runs; WGS runs range 8.7-38.6 GB compressed
relevance_notes: Open raw data and immunodeficiency-lymphoma biology; WGS subset is smaller than ideal but immediately usable.

dataset_name: EBV whole-genome sequencing from transplant recipients with PTLD
wgs_scale_evidence: EBV amplicon WGS, not human WGS
file_size_or_depth_evidence: NCBI RunInfo: 2.49 GB total; amplicon only
relevance_notes: Useful for PTLD EBV variation, not for human WGS EBV/anellovirus detection.

accession_or_project: no verified large public human WGS found
wgs_scale_evidence: No NIH/GDC/dbGaP/EGA large human-WGS PTLD cohort verified in this pass
relevance_notes: PTLD remains the weakest dataset area; likely needs author contact, institutional cohort, or transplant registry collaboration.
